narrative:
Bedford municipal court district has 57,647 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 36.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 27.2 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +11.4% D−R vs +33.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
